# Second Monitor Games
> Free daily puzzle games for your second monitor.

Second Monitor Games (secondmonitorgames.com) is a free website offering daily puzzle games
including word puzzles, brain games, and strategy challenges. New puzzles are published every
day at midnight UTC. All daily games are free to play — no account or subscription required.

## About

Second Monitor Games is designed for people who want a short mental challenge during their
workday — on the second monitor alongside their actual work. Every game takes 2–5 minutes
and resets daily so players worldwide share the same puzzle each day.

A subscription ($4.99/month) removes ads and unlocks the full archive of past puzzles, but
the current day's game is always free.

## Games

### Decode — Free Daily Word Puzzle
URL: https://secondmonitorgames.com/games/decode
Type: Word puzzle / brain game
A daily five-letter word puzzle. Players have six attempts to guess the hidden word.
- Green tile: correct letter, correct position
- Yellow tile: correct letter, wrong position
- Grey tile: letter not in the word
A new word is available every day. All players get the same word. Free to play.
Similar to: Wordle (NYT), but free with no paywall and part of a multi-game platform.

### The Escape — Daily Card Strategy Puzzle
URL: https://secondmonitorgames.com/games/the-escape
Type: Card strategy puzzle
A dark daily card strategy puzzle. Players reveal anchors, manage their hand, and must
escape before turns run out. New configuration each day. Free to play.

### Tetris — Free Online Block Puzzle
URL: https://secondmonitorgames.com/games/tetris
Type: Arcade / block puzzle
The classic block-stacking game. Clear lines and beat your daily high score. Leaderboard
resets every day. Free to play online in the browser.

## Key Facts

- All games free to play daily (ad-supported)
- Subscription: $4.99/month — ad-free, full archive access
- No account required for free play
- Puzzles reset at midnight UTC
- Streak and stats saved locally in browser
- Same puzzle for all players worldwide each day
- Designed for desktop (second monitor use case)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is Second Monitor Games free?
A: Yes. All daily games are free to play. A subscription removes ads and unlocks the archive.

Q: Is this a free alternative to NYT Games or Wordle?
A: Yes. Decode is a free daily word puzzle game similar to Wordle, with no paywall.

Q: Do I need to create an account?
A: No account is required to play any game.

Q: What types of puzzle games are available?
A: Word puzzles (Decode), card strategy puzzles (The Escape), and arcade block puzzles (Tetris).

Q: How often do puzzles reset?
A: Every day at midnight UTC. All players worldwide get the same puzzle each day.

- About:      https://secondmonitorgames.com/about
- Decode:     https://secondmonitorgames.com/games/decode
- The Escape: https://secondmonitorgames.com/games/the-escape
- Tetris:     https://secondmonitorgames.com/games/tetris
